title: Document a Function
description: Write clear API documentation for a function or method.
content:
Write documentation for this function:

```
{{code}}
```

Cover: what it does (one sentence), each parameter and its constraints, the return value, errors/exceptions it can raise, and a short usage example. Document the non-obvious: side effects, performance characteristics, and any gotcha a caller would hit. Match the docstring style of {{language}}.
